wallet: Zedra 1.1.9 and Nightly 1.49.48 detected in Chrome; probe account was not imported and no wallet transaction was signed

probe_package.compiled_digest_scheme: Cedra PackageRegistry source_digest recorded by the finalized publication

experiments.name: hook-registration
experiments.observations: Package publication finalized at version 149229979 before one-time initialization. DispatchFunctionStore records hook_probe::withdraw_hook, hook_probe::deposit_hook, and hook_probe::derived_balance_hook at the publisher address. ProbeInitialized records supply 1000000000000, frozen-vault allocation 1000000, metadata 0x829f63dba6c3bdcca0496f9ba59c7fd6bf6e251a84a8452aaae5d91822c9696, and reward vault 0xe8a95231603e2eb636e35b94f307c9998f0ce40e2e720861b3ac9fd9b64f5bec.

experiments.name: primary-store-peer-transfer
experiments.observations: Standard 0x1::primary_fungible_store::transfer moved 101 hRFL from publisher to sender. Finalized events contain exactly one 101-unit FungibleAsset::Withdraw and one 101-unit FungibleAsset::Deposit. Publisher raw/derived balances both became 999998999899; sender raw/derived/standard balances all became 101.

experiments.name: standard-derived-balance-query
experiments.observations: Cedra CLI returned sender raw=101, derived=101, and standard primary-store balance=101. A direct POST to /v1/view?ledger_version=149231103 returned ["101"] for 0x1::primary_fungible_store::balance. The H7 SDK witness independently repeats raw, derived, and standard reads at an exact later ledger version.

experiments.name: internal-reference-settlement
experiments.observations: TransferRef moved exactly 101 units from the frozen reward vault without dynamic-hook recursion or a duplicate movement. The transaction emitted one withdrawal, one deposit, and one ProbeRewardMaterialized event.

experiments.name: reward-vault-materialisation
experiments.observations: The vault fell exactly from 1000000 to 999899 and the recipient rose from raw/derived 0 to raw/derived/standard 101. ProbeRewardMaterialized records amount 101 and terminal vault balance 999899; no duplicate entitlement or movement was observed.

experiments.name: secondary-fungible-store
experiments.observations: The dispatch surface safely moved 40 units from the sender primary store to secondary store 0x844a4949959641953a83669197c6707458c1bc133f8ed27eac57ed18e4d2fd4d. Primary raw/derived both became 61; secondary raw/derived both became 40. The production tRFL policy still excludes arbitrary secondary/delegated custody and supports only explicitly registered canonical custody such as the AMM pool.

experiments.name: typescript-sdk-equivalence
experiments.observations: The read-only @cedra-labs/ts-sdk 2.2.8 witness queried ledger version 149232588 and returned primary raw=61, derived=61, standard=61; secondary raw=40, derived=40; vault=999899. It also retrieved the exact 40-unit withdraw, deposit, and SecondaryStoreFunded events from the finalized transaction.

experiments.name: wallet-display-and-transfer
experiments.observations: Zedra 1.1.9 and Nightly 1.49.48 are installed in the user's Chrome profile, but this WSL-hosted task could not attach to that profile because browser control failed before automation with 'sandboxCwd is not a local file URI'. No probe key was imported and no wallet transfer was signed. In addition, this compatibility probe's derived value equals raw value, so a wallet displaying 61 or 101 would not by itself prove derived-balance support. H8 therefore remains inconclusive and is not treated as a pass.
evidence_references: local Chrome extension manifest inventory; no wallet screenshot or transaction exists

decision_rationale: H1-H7 prove Cedra Testnet publication, hook registration, non-recursive framework transfer, exact TransferRef materialisation, secondary-store dispatch, and CLI/REST/SDK agreement. H8 did not prove a real wallet's distinct derived-balance display or transfer path. The safe initial tRFL release mode is therefore explicit on-chain claims; automatic materialisation remains disabled until a native-wallet run proves the missing behaviour.
approved_by: CryptoAutistic80 - Testnet hook-probe execution authorized in the Codex task on 2026-07-20
